productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of hi-ankle leather boots from franco leone. Give your semi-formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a high ankle design for absolute comfort and styleZipper on the medial side of the ankle for ease of use and to secure the foot in placeMidfoot buckled band with a tang clasp to further customise the FitSuede lining in the inner forefoot region and padded leather on the collar for all-day sweat-free comfortErgonomically curved leather footbed for absolute all-day sweat-free comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with geometrical grooves on the forefoot and textured on the back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
